Operation 'listPaymentMethods' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details. The current description is minimal and lacks details about what is returned. Added clarity about the response format (list of PaymentMethod objects), authentication requirement, and what information is included in each payment method for better AI agent decision-making.

data.current_description: Retrieve payment methods for the authenticated account
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves all payment methods associated with the authenticated user's account. Returns a list of PaymentMethod objects containing payment details, type, and status. Requires OAuth 2.0 authentication.
data.reasoning: The current description is minimal and lacks details about what is returned. Added clarity about the response format (list of PaymentMethod objects), authentication requirement, and what information is included in each payment method for better AI agent decision-making.

message: Operation 'createPaymentMethod' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Original description lacks specificity about input requirements, response structure, and side effects. Enhanced to clarify what PaymentMethodInput contains, what is returned, and that the payment method becomes immediately usable for transactions.

data.current_description: Add a new payment method to the account
data.description_suggestion: Creates a new payment method for the authenticated user's account. Accepts PaymentMethodInput containing payment details (card, bank account, or digital wallet information). Returns the created PaymentMethod object with a unique payment_method_id. The new payment method is immediately available for booking payments.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks specificity about input requirements, response structure, and side effects. Enhanced to clarify what PaymentMethodInput contains, what is returned, and that the payment method becomes immediately usable for transactions.

message: Operation 'updatePaymentMethod' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Original description is too generic. Added clarity about the path parameter requirement (payment_method_id), input structure, response format, partial update support, and when changes become effective for AI agents to understand the operation's full scope.

data.current_description: Update payment method details
data.description_suggestion: Updates an existing payment method identified by payment_method_id. Accepts PaymentMethodInput with updated payment details. Returns the updated PaymentMethod object. Supports partial updates - only provided fields are modified. Changes take effect immediately for future bookings.
data.reasoning: Original description is too generic. Added clarity about the path parameter requirement (payment_method_id), input structure, response format, partial update support, and when changes become effective for AI agents to understand the operation's full scope.

message: Operation 'deletePaymentMethod' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Original description lacks details about response format, side effects, and implications. Enhanced to specify the HTTP response code, clarify that deletion is immediate, and explain that existing bookings remain valid to help AI agents understand the full impact of this operation.

data.current_description: Remove a payment method from the account
data.description_suggestion: Deletes a payment method identified by payment_method_id from the authenticated user's account. Returns a 204 No Content response on successful deletion. The payment method is immediately unavailable for new bookings. Existing bookings using this payment method are unaffected.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks details about response format, side effects, and implications. Enhanced to specify the HTTP response code, clarify that deletion is immediate, and explain that existing bookings remain valid to help AI agents understand the full impact of this operation.

message: Operation 'updateCurrentAccount' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Current description is too vague about what fields can be updated and what is returned. Added clarity about partial update support, return value (Account object), and authentication requirement to improve AI agent interpretability.

data.current_description: Update the authenticated user account information
data.description_suggestion: Updates the authenticated user's account information using the provided AccountInput fields. Supports partial updates - only provided fields will be modified. Returns the updated Account object. Requires authentication.
data.reasoning: Current description is too vague about what fields can be updated and what is returned. Added clarity about partial update support, return value (Account object), and authentication requirement to improve AI agent interpretability.

message: Operation 'listTickets' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Original description lacks information about available parameters (filtering/pagination), return format, and what ticket details are included. Enhanced description helps AI agents understand filtering capabilities and expected response structure.

data.current_description: Retrieve support tickets for the authenticated user
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves all support tickets for the authenticated user. Supports filtering and pagination via query parameters. Returns a list of Ticket objects with details including status, subject, and creation date. Requires authentication.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks information about available parameters (filtering/pagination), return format, and what ticket details are included. Enhanced description helps AI agents understand filtering capabilities and expected response structure.

message: Operation 'createTicket' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Description lacks detail about what TicketInput fields are required, what the response contains, and that a ticket_id is generated. Added specifics about ticket creation, response structure, and authentication to improve AI agent understanding of the operation's effects.

data.current_description: Submit a new support ticket
data.description_suggestion: Creates a new support ticket for the authenticated user using the provided TicketInput data. The ticket is immediately created and assigned a unique ticket_id. Returns the created Ticket object with status, timestamps, and ticket identifier. Requires authentication.
data.reasoning: Description lacks detail about what TicketInput fields are required, what the response contains, and that a ticket_id is generated. Added specifics about ticket creation, response structure, and authentication to improve AI agent understanding of the operation's effects.

message: Operation 'updateTicket' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Original description is vague about which ticket is being updated, what fields can be changed, and what is returned. Enhanced description clarifies the ticket_id parameter requirement, partial update support, return value, and access control to help AI agents understand operation scope and constraints.

data.current_description: Update an existing support ticket
data.description_suggestion: Updates an existing support ticket identified by ticket_id using the provided TicketInput data. Supports partial updates - only provided fields will be modified. Returns the updated Ticket object. Requires authentication and ownership of the ticket.
data.reasoning: Original description is vague about which ticket is being updated, what fields can be changed, and what is returned. Enhanced description clarifies the ticket_id parameter requirement, partial update support, return value, and access control to help AI agents understand operation scope and constraints.

data.description_suggestion: Adds a new vehicle to the authenticated user's account using the provided VehicleInput data (e.g., make, model, license plate, color). data.reasoning: Original description lacks information about what VehicleInput fields are expected, what the response contains, and that a vehicle identifier is generated.
